rationale: The pair shows strong conceptual overlap: both papers focus on consumer response to new products, uncertainty/risk-benefit evaluations, and conditions tied to product newness/continuity. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior work on new-product uncertainty and addresses how uncertainty importance shifts over time, while the cited note is a mechanism-heavy prior on knowledge structures and responses to continuous vs. discontinuous innovations. Given this plausible substantive linkage and only sparse reference-context text, this should be kept for full relation judgment rather than dropped.
